expectations.text: Claude reads the backlog and identifies ready items
expectations.evidence: Read backlog and identified 2 ready items with details

expectations.text: The highest-priority ready item is surfaced (Add rate limiting to API)
expectations.evidence: Listed 'Add rate limiting to API' as item #1 with full details

expectations.text: Claude offers to pick it up or start working on it
expectations.evidence: Response: "Want me to start working on it?"

expectations.text: Claude does not just start working without confirming with the user
expectations.evidence: Asked for confirmation, did not begin implementation
